changes.summary: BC-12 infrastructure CookieManager owns domain normalization, AUTH_SESSION_SAME_SITE, isRequestSecure, resolveIsProduction, and auth flows: logoutJwt, clearAllRequestCookies, establishJwtAuth (full|oauth), setAuthSessionCookie. Low-level clear/setJwtCookie retained for UserGuard and legacy callers.
Deprecated one-line re-export shim to infrastructure/auth/cookie-manager for ApiV1CommonModule and existing imports without module churn in this work unit.

Imports infrastructure CookieManager; removed private isHttpsRequest and duplicated JWT/session cookie attribute blocks. REST auth delegates to logoutJwt, clearAllRequestCookies, establishJwtAuth, setAuthSessionCookie.
Removed local isHttpsRequest and inline cookie attribute logic; tRPC logout/clear/fake auth delegates to infrastructure CookieManager same as REST.

verification.attempt_0_verifiers: tsc pass, lint pass, static pass (2/5 clusters); llm partial due to missing verdict_llm.scratch.yaml path (infra issue, not code)

notes: Attempt 1 confirmed attempt-0 implementation; no additional code edits required. common.module.ts, user.guard.ts, trpc/context.ts still import via cookie-manager.util re-export.
